_comment_1: Drop this into .claude/settings.json at your project root to auto-register the marketplace for the whole team. Teammates who trust the project folder are prompted to install. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-marketplaces#require-marketplaces-for-your-team
_comment_2: Pin specific plugins to be enabled by default for everyone on the project. Comment out the ones you don't want. The placeholder-heavy `ios-workflow` plugin only works well after running bootstrap.sh — recommend keeping it OFF here and installing via bootstrap.sh instead.
